title: Finding and Keeping Water Safe
summary: A practical guide to hydration, water pumps, containers, purification, and avoiding waterborne illness.

steps.title: Prefer water pumps
steps.body: Public water pumps are the most dependable early source of drinking water on vanilla maps.

steps.title: Treat unknown containers as contaminated
steps.body: A found bottle or canteen may contain unsafe water. Empty it before filling it at a trusted source.

steps.title: Purify surface water
steps.body: Water collected from ponds, streams, or other natural sources should be purified with an appropriate method before drinking.

steps.title: Keep clean and dirty containers separate
steps.body: If your group transports untreated water, designate containers so nobody drinks from the wrong one.

steps.title: Drink before long travel
steps.body: Hydrate at a safe pump before leaving town rather than carrying an emergency-level thirst problem into the wilderness.

steps.title: Avoid overexposure
steps.body: Water pumps are predictable player contact points. Listen, observe, drink efficiently, and move away.

tips: Carry at least one refillable container once you leave the coast.
Do not wait for severe thirst before planning your next water stop.
warnings: Purification mechanics can change; verify exact item behavior after major updates.

verification.note: Designed for vanilla DayZ. Exact values and recipes should be verified against the current game files before publication.

presentation.coverAlt: DayZ scene illustrating Finding and Keeping Water Safe

reader.completionMessage: You are ready to put this guide into practice.
